rooms.name: Frozen Cairn
rooms.description: Snowdrifts obscure ancient runes that whisper secrets in the wind. Exits: 'north', 'east'.

rooms.name: Ravenhurst Keep
rooms.description: A decrepit fortress with walls shrouded in night-black feathers and silence. Exits: 'west', 'north'.

rooms.name: Widow's Grotto
rooms.description: Sea foam hisses into a dark cave where the echoes of lost lovers linger. Exits: 'south', 'east', 'north'.

rooms.name: Sundered Sceptre
rooms.description: A staff that shattered once, now broken pieces whisper ancient magic. Exits: 'west', 'south', 'north'.

rooms.name: Tome of Echoes
rooms.description: Yellowed pages contain the forgotten histories of kings long dead. Exits: 'south', 'east'.

rooms.name: Shattered Crown
rooms.description: A diadem that once held power now rusts with the weight of a thousand betrayals. Exits: 'south', 'west'.

items.name: Voidstone Dagger
items.description: A blade that drinks light and whispers of forgotten names.

items.name: Gravewarden Shield
items.description: A shield etched with the names of every warrior who ever carried it.

items.name: Flask of Moonfire
items.description: Liquid starlight swirls within; one sip mends shattered flesh.

items.name: Widowmaker's Bow
items.description: A bowstring made from a widow's black hair, whispering vengeance in every shot.

items.name: Moonstone Amulet
items.description: An amulet forged from lunar rock, protecting the wearer from madness.

npcs.name: Mira the Undying
npcs.description: A pale merchant who sells only by candlelight and never blinks.
npcs.dialogue: Step closer, traveler; I carry wares the living rarely dare to buy.

npcs.name: Grask the Bone-Render
npcs.description: A skeleton animated by dark sorcery, its joints wrapped in rusted chain.
npcs.dialogue: Your bones will join my collection before this night is through.

npcs.name: Elara of the Mire
npcs.description: A swamp-witch whose eyes hold centuries of cold, patient malice.
npcs.dialogue: The thing you seek lies where the roots drink from the forgotten dead.

npcs.name: Asher Blackwood
npcs.description: A charismatic thief with a reputation for stealing more than gold.
npcs.dialogue: Meet me at Ravenhurst Keep's old stables at midnight if you wish to be rich.

npcs.name: Eira Shadowglow
npcs.description: A lone ranger tracking an ancient evil through the cursed kingdom.

quests.name: Grask the Bone-Render
quests.description: A skeleton animated by dark sorcery, its joints wrapped in rusted chain.

quests.name: Thrain Ironfist
quests.description: A dwarf warrior sworn to protect the people of Ravenhurst Keep from the horrors that lurk within.

player.name: Korvus Darkhaven
player.description: A brave young warrior with a sharp mind and sharper blade.
